playlist.title: Commander's Note
playlist.body: “Readiness is a daily choice. Thank you for the work you do every day to keep this command mission-ready.” — COL J. Sample, Commanding

playlist.title: Building Directory
playlist.body:
Floor 1: Reception, S1 Admin, Visitor Center
Floor 2: S2/S3 Operations
Floor 3: Command Group, Conference Center
Floor 4: S4 Logistics, IT Support

playlist.title: Network & IT Status
playlist.body: All systems operational. Scheduled maintenance window: Sunday 0200-0400.

playlist.title: Floor Directory
playlist.body: 1: Lobby & Reception  |  2: S2/S3 Operations  |  3: Command Group  |  4: S4 Logistics

playlist.title: Safety Reminder
playlist.body: In case of fire, use stairwells. Do not use elevators during an emergency evacuation.

playlist.title: This Week's Training
playlist.body: Mon: PT 0600 — Tue: Weapons Qualification — Wed: CBRN Refresher — Thu: Convoy Live Fire — Fri: Sergeant's Time Training

playlist.title: Soldier of the Month
playlist.body: SGT M. Rivera, S3 Operations — for exceptional performance during JRTC rotation 26-08.

playlist.title: Mission Update
playlist.body: Division CPX planning continues through next week. POC: S3 Operations.

playlist.title: OPSEC Reminder
playlist.body: Loose talk costs lives. Verify recipients before discussing movement schedules.

playlist.title: DFAC Menu — Today
playlist.body: Lunch: Grilled chicken, rice, steamed vegetables, side salad bar. Dinner: Pasta bar, garlic bread.

playlist.title: Unit Morale Event
playlist.body: Family Day BBQ this Saturday, 1100-1500 at the Community Park. All hands welcome.
